title: Dangerous Curve Ahead
actors: Helene Chadwick, Richard Dix, Maurice 'Lefty' Flynn
plot: Engaged to Harley Jones, fickle Phoebe Mabee flirts with Anson Newton. She and Harley, as a result, break their engagement, but within six months they are reconciled and married. Phoebe becomes a mother, and when Harley is sent ab...
